learning_style.when_stuck: tries multiple approaches, then asks for pushback or alternative framing
learning_style.notes: Experiential learner — discovers through conversation, not upfront analysis. Never writes from blank pages. Directs the build, doesn't pour concrete himself.

method_proficiency.notes: Expert level — uses TDD regularly, default approach, teaches others.

personality.self_description: Conductor-architect. Strong taste, relentless iteration. Self-taught. Gets nervous before big changes — channels it into reading files and listing risks.
personality.motivation: Autonomy (designs the blueprint, directs the build) and Competence (naming blind spots, rejecting what doesn't feel right).
personality.notes: Writing is slow — interview him, draft for review. Discovers constraints through conversation.

military.job_description: EOD technician (bomb squad). Defused IEDs, operated remote robots, conducted render safe procedures under high-risk conditions. Wide operational scope across multiple threat types.
extracted_concepts: render safe procedures (methodical step-by-step approach, confirm each stage)
risk analysis and threat assessment before action
remote operation of robots and tools

translation_to_code.render_safe_procedures: Debugging methodology — don't guess and hope, follow the steps, confirm each stage works before proceeding. A bug in production is a live device.
translation_to_code.risk_analysis: Code review and impact assessment — evaluate what can break before you touch it
translation_to_code.remote_operation: Automation and tooling — build systems that do the dangerous work so humans stay safe
translation_to_code.precision_under_pressure: Production incident response — stay methodical when everything's on fire
translation_to_code.fail_safe: Error handling and defensive programming — design for failure, contain faults, fail gracefully

session_history.notes: Profile created from Kimberly playbook import. Testing learner-profile system.
